name: Root Canal Treatment
description: Painless, precise root canal therapy to save infected teeth, performed with modern numbing techniques and clear step-by-step guidance.

name: Dental Cleaning
description: Professional scaling and polishing to remove plaque and tartar, keeping your gums healthy and your smile bright.

name: Fillings & Restorations
description: Tooth-colored fillings that blend naturally with your smile while restoring strength and function.

name: Dental Consultation
description: A thorough check-up and honest advice on the right treatment path for your specific concern.

name: Emergency / Tooth Pain
description: Prompt care for sudden tooth pain, swelling, or dental injuries — because pain shouldn't have to wait.

name: Cosmetic Dentistry
description: Smile makeovers including whitening and shaping to help you feel confident about your smile.

name: Tooth Extraction
description: Safe, gentle removal of damaged or problematic teeth with a focus on comfort and quick recovery.

name: Pediatric Dentistry
description: Friendly, patient dental care designed to keep younger patients relaxed and smiling.
